title: README Backers section
goal: Add a Backers section to the README that thanks sponsors, with an auto-generation placeholder (comment markers for a tool like sponsorkit) and a call-to-action linking to GitHub Sponsors, placed next to the Support section.

steps.title: Add Backers section to README
steps.detail: A Backers section near Support thanking sponsors, with an auto-generation placeholder (sponsorkit-style comment markers) and a Sponsor call-to-action linking to github.com/sponsors/czsoftcode.

steps.title: Wrap up and checks
steps.detail: npm run typecheck and npm test stay green; the new section links resolve.
